title: RHS/MTTKRP B=TZ must be formed observed-only (avoid O(nM) MTTKRP)

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
The PCG right-hand side is $(I_r\otimes K)\vecop(B)=\vecop(KB)$ with $B=TZ$ the MTTKRP.

**Gap.** The naive MTTKRP $B=TZ$ costs $O(nMr)$ (an $O(M)$ object), which is explicitly banned. This is a *distinct* object from the LHS matvec (cf. q10-2): the RHS must be assembled once before CG starts.

**What must be proved.** Since $T$ (zero-filled mode-$k$ unfolding) has only $q$ nonzeros at the observed index pairs $(i_\ell,j_\ell)$ with value $t_\ell=T(i_\ell,j_\ell)$, one has
$$B(i,:)=\sum_{\ell:\,i_\ell=i} t_\ell\,Z(j_\ell,:),\qquad i=1,\dots,n,$$
computable in $O(qr)$, after which $KB$ costs $O(n^2r)$. Total $O(qr+n^2r)$, no $O(M)$/$O(N)$. Rows $Z(j_\ell,:)$ are obtained on demand from the Khatri-Rao structure in $O(dr)$ each, never forming $Z\in\mathbb R^{M\times r}$.

**Verified numerically:** observed-only $B$ equals dense $TZ$ for random data.

A complete solution must include this derivation and fold it into the PCG algorithm box's setup phase.
